Old hotel yet very comfortable stay. Rooms were spacious and the best part is the service of this hotel which was very good. The veg food was tasty and well cooked. Thanks for including ragi porridge in the breakfast buffet. Good initiative to keep our fellow people in good health. We stayed there for 4 days and we enjoyed the stay. Additional pillows were given. Services like laundry was available too. The house keeping team, the women team did a great job in cleaning the room. Right from check in to check out everything was smooth. They are renovating this hotel section by section yet the demands are always met. Car parking is convenient although it's open parking. The location of this hotel is also good. Thank you team. I so wish I had asked for the names of the 2 notable people in the reception. I think her name is Veera, special thanks to them.

Got scammed, Disappointed:

Their restaurant is doing a scam by selling a 20Rs MRP Kinley 1L water bottle for 58Rs. When i asked why they’re charging more than MRP, they just said it’s a hotel price and didn’t care to explain much. Even after paying 6000Rs for their room, they’re giving only two 10Rs water bottle as complimentary. Be aware and get water bottles from outside shops.

Major cons for me as a hygiene person:

Hotel sofa and furnitures are very old and had lot of dirt, couldn’t make my small kid sit there. Kettle in room was very dirty and lot of dust accumulated, can’t be used by anyone. Restaurant’s utensils are very old and has lot of stains in coffee cup, plates, flask etc. They should replace those utensils with new ones especially the Big Dosa Pan, omelette pan what the chef uses is not so clean and very unhygienic. They’re not refilling food promptly, making us wait for long time. These are the main cons here. In short, Hotel is just “okay” for its price but not worth it for 6000Rs what i paid!!

Inconvenience:
They have a BIG size key chain(approx 15cm)for room keys which is very hard to carry around. They need to replace this with a medium size key chains for sure. I have stayed in lot of hotels so far and never had to worry about carrying a room key so far.

Unethical and Disgraceful – A Warning to All Travelers

Booked a room at Breeze Residency, Trichy via Booking.com (check-in: June 5, check-out: June 7). Booking was confirmed. On June 3, I get a random call from the hotel: “Your booking is cancelled.” No explanation. Booking.com still shows it as valid. Repeated calls to the hotel?   Ignored. Blatantly.
Only later did I learn from locals that this is a routine scam. During wedding seasons or high demand,  hotel cancels confirmed bookings from online portals and resells the rooms at inflated prices to big groups. No apology. No integrity. Just pure, greedy opportunism.
Guests who booked through platforms like Booking.com are treated as disposable.
This is completely unethical and shows zero respect for travelers. My trip with family was thrown into chaos because of this. Breeze Residency is not just unreliable—it’s dishonest. Think twice before booking here.

I had a reasonably pleasant stay at Breeze Residency Tiruchi, which offers spacious and comfortable rooms, ideal for travelers seeking convenience and ease. One of the hotel’s strongest advantages is its strategic location, with close proximity to some of Tiruchirappalli’s most revered temples. Notable landmarks within easy reach include the Sri Ranganathaswamy Temple in Srirangam, the Jambukeswarar Temple in Thiruvanaikaval, and the Rockfort Ucchi Pillayar Temple, all of which are popular pilgrimage and cultural sites.

The hotel’s Madras Multi-Cuisine Restaurant, located on the ground floor, serves a variety of Indian and international dishes. The South Indian fare such as dosai and sambar was satisfying, while the North Indian and Indo-Chinese options were decent but could be improved in terms of flavor depth and consistency. The ambiance is relaxed and family-friendly, though service may be a bit slow during busy hours.

Overall, Breeze Residency Tiruchi provides a moderate and value-friendly experience, especially suitable for pilgrims and travelers looking for spacious rooms, decent food, and a location that gives easy access to Tiruchi’s iconic temples and spiritual heritage.
